code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
mut sum = 0
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut stop = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n and not stop
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if v < 0
          stop = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
        end
      when None
        stop = true
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
when None
  sum = 0
end
println("partial=#{sum}")
